name: wick-monorepo
description: Wick Markets — Sui touch/no-touch options. Workspaces: sdk, api, keeper, frontend.

scripts.verify:fairness:tamper: echo '== TAMPER DEMO == a recorded segment is deliberately altered, so the FAIL below is the verifier CATCHING the lie (that is the whole point). The REAL chain PASSes: npm run verify:fairness.' && tsx scripts/verify-v4.ts --rpc mock://tamper-v4 --ride 0xmock
scripts.verify:offline: npm run verify:pro-fairness && npm run verify:fairness && npm -w @wick/sdk test && npm -w @wick/api test && npm -w wick-keeper test && npm -w wick-bots test && npm run test:pro-options && npm run test:candle-vision && npm run test:verify-v4 && npm run test:audit-rugs && npm run test:rug-roll && npm run test:verify-payout && npm run test:verify-barriers && npm run test:vault-solvency && npm run test:verify-randomness && npm run test:audit-deployment && npm run test:gas-report && npm run test:live-verify && npm run test:audit-ride && npm run test:chart-live && npm run test:faucet-runway && npm run test:verify-replay && npm run test:greeks-display && npm run test:safety
scripts.check:all: npm run check:meta && npm run smoke:demo && npm run check:routes && npm run verify:pro && npm run verify:pro-fairness && npm run verify:fairness && npm run check:rugs -- --max-rounds 50 && npm run check:deepbook && npm run check:treasury && npm run check:chart-live && npm run check:faucet-runway
scripts.e2e: npm run e2e:pro && npm run e2e:verify && npm run e2e:coach && npm run e2e:ride && npm run e2e:verify-live
scripts.build:frontend-deps: npm run build:sdk && npm run build:candle-vision && npm run build:candle-vision-react && npm run build:pro-options
scripts.build:frontend: npm run build:frontend-deps && npm -w frontend run build
scripts.build:packages: npm run build:candle-vision && npm run build:candle-vision-react && npm run build:pro-options
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:sdk && npm run build:api && npm run build:keeper && npm run build:bots && npm run build:frontend
scripts.test: npm run test:offline && npm run test:live
scripts.test:offline: npm -w @wick/sdk test && npm -w wick-bots test && npm -w wick-keeper test && npm -w @wick/api test && npm run test:candle-vision && npm -w @sui-options/candle-vision-react test && npm run test:pro-options && npm run test:pro-fairness && npm run test:verify-pro-round && npm run test:play-verify-loop && npm run test:pro-commit-conformance && npm run test:pro-pnl && npm run test:verify-v4 && npm run test:audit-rugs && npm run test:rug-roll && npm run test:verify-payout && npm run test:verify-barriers && npm run test:vault-solvency && npm run test:verify-randomness && npm run test:audit-deployment && npm run test:gas-report && npm run test:verify-replay && npm run test:greeks-display && npm run test:audit-ride && npm run test:chart-live && npm run test:faucet-runway && npm run test:live-verify && npm run test:safety && npm run test:doc-links && npm run test:cold-gate-coverage
scripts.test:live: echo 'no network-requiring unit tests — live verification runs via e2e:* and check:* targets'
scripts.conformance:check: npm run conformance && git diff --exit-code move/tests/seeded_path_conformance.move
scripts.typecheck: npm -w frontend run typecheck && npm -w @wick/api run typecheck && npm -w wick-keeper run typecheck && npm -w wick-bots run typecheck
scripts.ci: npm run build:packages && npm run build:sdk && npm run check:dist && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build:frontend
